heading: Step 5: Remember metadata.
body:
- In the left navigation, click **Overview**.

  Copy the **Application (client) ID** value.

- In the top navigation, click **Endpoints**.

  Copy the **OpenID Connect metadata document** value
  without the `/.well-known/openid-configuration` part.

  You can also retrieve this value by following the
  **OpenID Connect metadata document** URL (Uniform Resource Locator) and
  copying the value for `issuer`.The following table shows what these Microsoft Entra ID UI values map to in our Atlas Configuration Properties:| Microsoft Entra ID UI                                                        | Atlas Configuration Property |
| ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------- |
| OpenID Connect metadata document (without /.well-known/openid-configuration) | Issuer URI.                  |
| Application (client) ID                                                      | Client ID.                   |
| Application ID URI (\<Application ID>)                                       | Audience                     |**Gcp-oauth:**GCPYou don't need to make any configuration changes in your Google Cloud account.
